_comment: This is an EXAMPLE. Copy the real proof from the World ID Simulator.
_instructions: 1. Go to https://developer.worldcoin.org/ and open your app (Staging env)
3. Follow the flow and click Approve
4. Copy ONLY the fields below (merkle_root, nullifier_hash, proof, verification_level)
5. Paste them into claimshield/world-id-proof.json (without the _comment field)
